title: Kth Smallest Element in a Sorted Matrix
description:
Given an n x n matrix where each of the rows and columns is sorted in ascending order, return the kth smallest element in the matrix.

Note that it is the kth smallest element in the sorted order, not the kth distinct element.

You must find a solution with a memory complexity better than O(n^2).
input_format: The first line contains n and k. The next n lines each contain n integers separated by space.
constraints: All the rows and columns of matrix are guaranteed to be sorted in non-decreasing order.
